tests.test_name: Coverage run produces a populated coverage table
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that submitting a user story with acceptance criteria alongside a BDD test file produces a coverage table with results.

test_coverage.verification_step: Paste a user story with explicit acceptance criteria
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The page accepts a user story as input

test_coverage.verification_step: Upload a BDD test case fixture
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The page accepts a test file upload

test_coverage.verification_step: Click Check Coverage
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage analysis is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: Result contains a coverage table with at least one row
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The analysis produces a non-empty coverage table mapping acceptance criteria to tests

test_coverage.verification_step: Result is non-empty
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The overall output is populated and not blank

tests.test_name: Non-covered AC rows have a risk value
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that acceptance criteria not covered by any test are flagged with a risk value in the coverage table.

test_coverage.verification_step: Paste the story coverage login story fixture
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A known user story is submitted for analysis

test_coverage.verification_step: Upload the story coverage incomplete test fixture
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A test file that does not cover all acceptance criteria is provided

test_coverage.verification_step: Click Check Coverage
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage analysis is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: Every non-covered row has a non-empty risk value
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Uncovered acceptance criteria display a risk assessment so stakeholders understand the gap

tests.test_name: Fully covered AC rows have no risk value
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that acceptance criteria fully covered by tests do not show a risk value, keeping the report clean and unambiguous.

test_coverage.verification_step: Paste the story coverage login story fixture
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A known user story is submitted for analysis

test_coverage.verification_step: Upload the story coverage complete test fixture
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A test file that covers all acceptance criteria is provided

test_coverage.verification_step: Click Check Coverage
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage analysis is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: No covered row has a risk value
test_coverage.what_it_checks: Fully covered acceptance criteria are not incorrectly flagged with risk

tests.test_name: Markdown download works after coverage run
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that once a coverage result is available, the user can download it as a Markdown file.

test_coverage.verification_step: A coverage result has been produced
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A completed coverage analysis is available on the page

test_coverage.verification_step: Click the Download MD button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The Markdown export action is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: A .md file is downloaded
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage report is successfully exported in Markdown format

tests.test_name: HTML download works after coverage run
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that once a coverage result is available, the user can download it as an HTML file.

test_coverage.verification_step: A coverage result has been produced
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A completed coverage analysis is available on the page

test_coverage.verification_step: Click the Download HTML button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The HTML export action is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: A .html file is downloaded
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage report is successfully exported in HTML format

tests.test_name: JSON download works after coverage run
tests.feature: Story vs. Test Coverage — real Claude scenarios
tests.description: Verifies that once a coverage result is available, the user can download it as a JSON file.

test_coverage.verification_step: A coverage result has been produced
test_coverage.what_it_checks: A completed coverage analysis is available on the page

test_coverage.verification_step: Click the Download JSON button
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The JSON export action is triggered

test_coverage.verification_step: A .json file is downloaded
test_coverage.what_it_checks: The coverage report is successfully exported in JSON format for programmatic use
